{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20996_1
|class_id=20996
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=collection@20996_2
|fame=31
|art=15
|fth=15
|civ=14
|tech=15
|ss1=prop@58578_2<br>prop@58567_2<br>prop@58568_2<br>prop@58568_3
|ss2=prop@58578_2<br>prop@58567_2<br>prop@58568_2<br>prop@58568_3
|ss3=prop@58578_2<br>prop@58567_2<br>prop@58568_2<br>prop@58568_3
|ss4=prop@58578_2<br>prop@58567_2<br>prop@58568_2<br>prop@58568_3
|ss7=prop@58578_2<br>prop@58567_2<br>prop@58568_2<br>prop@58568_3<br> (Awakened)
}}
